heroTagline: Get answers fast, and find your focus
heroSubtext: Invaluable insight into your life choices, backed by ancient vedic practices
whatIsSubtext: Vedic Numerology is an ancient system that uses the numbers in your birth date and name to reveal deep truths about your personality, life purpose, and the timing of key events in your life.
comparisonText: Vedic Numerology is rooted in ancient Indian mathematics and astrology, providing a more nuanced understanding of your numbers and their influence on your life journey.
powerText: Every number carries a specific vibration that influences different areas of life. Understanding your numbers can bring remarkable clarity to situations that once felt confusing or stuck.
sessionIncludes: Your Life Path, Expression, and Soul Urge number analysis
Personal Year cycle reading for actionable timing insights
Q&A — bring your specific questions for focused clarity
Follow-up notes summarising your key insights
ctaSectionSubtext: Book your personalised Numerology for Clarity session today.
